_comment: Ebonbloom Wastes – Zone 2 (Levels 10–15). Corrupted desert-forest hybrid with void-tainted flora, fungal undead, and halfling frontier settlements.
biome: void-scarred desert-forest hybrid, fungal groves, corrupted dunes

void_bloom_spores.notes: Stacks applied by proximity to corrupted flora.

fungal_infection_stacks.notes: Removed by herbal poultices or Warden cleansing pools.

signature_features.ebonbloom_grove: Heart of the corruption; massive void-tainted tree with fungal undead.
signature_features.ashen_hollows: Burned-out caverns where fungal spores gather.
signature_features.shatterroot_canyon: Jagged canyon filled with corrupted treants and root beasts.
signature_features.cinderglen_outskirts: Halfling frontier burrows and geothermal vents.
signature_features.voidscar_ridge: Rift-scarred ridge where shadow elementals manifest.

garden_wardens.description: Halfling defenders fighting the spread of fungal corruption.
garden_wardens.notes: Operate cleansing pools and herbal stations.

moribund_order.description: Void cultists accelerating the corruption to awaken buried relics.

fungal_undead.description: Reanimated corpses overtaken by parasitic fungal blooms.
fungal_undead.notes: Explode into spore clouds on death.

corrupted_beasts.description: Wildlife twisted by void‑tainted pollen and fungal infection.

story_seeds: Garden Wardens report a massive fungal bloom deep within Ebonbloom Grove.
Moribund Order ritualists are attempting to awaken something beneath Voidscar Ridge.
A corrupted treant known as the Rootbound Titan has begun roaming Shatterroot Canyon.
Steamweaver defectors are smuggling voidbloom fragments into Cinderglen.
A halfling scouting party vanished near the Ashen Hollows.
